title: viola excisa var. subaequiloba
intro: Viola excisa var. subaequiloba, also known as the variable pansy violet, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the viola genus. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as antimicrobial and antiseptic actions. The health benefits of Viola excisa var. subaequiloba include treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, salve, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
